description: The funds allotted to a cost center or project for a period, with running available, committed, and actual balances. Soft-checked at requisition (warn only, no block, no ledger change) and hard-committed (encumbered) at PO issue; commitment is relieved to actual at GR/invoice (axiom A4). Build-new finance control: approval limits are not budget control; a real operation checks funds and encumbers them separately.

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Budget Ref.
fields.validation: configurable pattern; unique; immutable once created
fields.purpose: Stable key that ties every soft check, commitment, and relief posting back to one budget line so commitment-vs-actual reporting and over-commitment prevention resolve against a single record.

fields.name: costCenterId
fields.label: Cost Center / Project
fields.validation: an ACTIVE cost center or project; one budget per cost-center/project per period (natural key with period)
fields.purpose: Scopes the budget to the cost center or project the spend is charged to so the requisition's projectOrCostCenterId resolves to the right available/committed/actual balances for the soft check and the hard commit.

fields.name: period
fields.label: Period
fields.validation: a fiscal period (e.g. FY2026, 2026-Q1, 2026-05); part of the natural key with costCenterId
fields.purpose: Bounds the allotment to a fiscal window so checks and commitments are matched to the period they fall in and period-over-period budget reporting is possible.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; checks compare base-currency values so cross-currency requisitions/POs are comparable
fields.purpose: The currency the budget balances are held in; the soft check and hard-commit guard compare against base-currency requisition/PO values so a foreign-currency spend is checked on a comparable figure (axiom A12).

fields.name: amount
fields.label: Budget Amount
fields.validation: >= 0; the total allotment for the cost-center/period; available + committed + actual reconcile to it over the period
fields.purpose: The total funds allotted for the period; the ceiling the running available/committed/actual balances are derived from and the basis of utilization reporting.

fields.name: availableAmount
fields.label: Available Amount
fields.validation: >= 0 (unless an approved override allows over-commit); reduced by poValue only at hard commit, NOT changed at relief
fields.computedFormula: amount - committedAmount - actualAmount (reduced at hard commit; unchanged at relief)
fields.purpose: The uncommitted funds left to spend; the figure the soft check warns against (value <= availableAmount) and the hard-commit guard enforces (availableAmount >= poValue OR approved override). Reduced only at commit so a committed PO cannot be double-spent.

fields.name: committedAmount
fields.label: Committed Amount
fields.validation: >= 0; increased by poValue at hard commit; decreased by reliefAmount at GR/invoice relief
fields.computedFormula: SUM(Commitment.amount WHERE status == committed) - relieved portion
fields.purpose: The encumbered (reserved-but-not-yet-spent) funds; rises when a PO is committed and falls as goods/invoices relieve it to actual. The open-commitment figure in commitment-vs-actual reporting.

fields.name: actualAmount
fields.label: Actual Amount
fields.validation: >= 0; increased by reliefAmount at GR/invoice relief (committed -> actual)
fields.purpose: The funds actually consumed once goods are received or invoiced; the realized-spend figure that commitment relief moves money into. The actual side of commitment-vs-actual reporting.

fields.name: overCommitAllowed
fields.label: Over-Commit Allowed
fields.validation: false by default; a hard commit beyond availableAmount requires an approved, logged Budget Owner override carried forward, not this flag alone
fields.purpose: Records whether this budget tolerates committing beyond available funds; the over-commitment prevention guard blocks a PO unless this is permitted via an approved, logged override.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.label: Created At
fields.purpose: Timestamps when the allotment was set up; orders the posting history for the audit trail of budget changes.

invariants: A4 budget soft-checked at requisition (warn, no block), hard-committed (encumbered) at PO, relieved to actual at GR/invoice; approval limits are not budget control
availableAmount reduced only at hard commit, unchanged at relief
over budget requires an approved, logged Budget Owner override to commit
A12 base-currency normalization for all checks
A13 audit + SSE on every committed change
